title: Governance Finding
description: A single finding produced during reconciliation of observed agent behavior against a mission declaration. Each finding identifies a specific code, an optional link to the triggering event, and a human-readable message explaining what was detected.

code.description: Machine-readable finding code such as UNDECLARED_TOOL or SCOPE_EXPANSION. Must start with an uppercase letter and contain only uppercase letters, digits, and underscores.

event_id.description: Identifier of the observed event that triggered this finding. Omitted when the finding is session-wide rather than event-specific.

field.description: The specific field or attribute within the event or declaration that the finding pertains to, such as 'tool_name' or 'side_effect_class'.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the finding, including enough context for an operator to understand what was observed and why it matters.

violation.description: Short label classifying the violation type when applicable, such as 'undeclared_tool', 'scope_expansion', or 'exfiltration'.

severity.description: Severity level of the finding. 'info' for observations that may warrant attention, 'warning' for policy deviations that do not yet pose immediate risk, 'critical' for violations requiring immediate containment.
